lines: Ndeger’Umusaraba , Nnar we, nkennye, mpumye; Nta kindi kindi nshaka : Ngusabye kunkiz’ubu.
Mwami ndakwiringiye Ayi Mucunguzi wanjye; Dor’uko nkunamiye  Mwami
Nakwifujije kera,Ndi mu ngoyi z'ibyaha; Maz’umbwiranez'uti: Ngukiz’ibicumuro !
Ubu ndakwihereje: End’ibyo mfite byose, Ubwenge n'imbaraga; Byose Yes’ubyakire.
Nizey’ibyo wavuze N'amaraso wavuye; Ndicuza gutinda ntyo: None, Yesu, nyakira!
Yesu, non’ungezemo ; Urakaza, Mukiza ! Nta n'ineng' umbaraho  Shimwa, shimwa, Nyakuza !
